part.text:
## Goal

Implement the "Access Code Gate (Coupon Logic)" feature - a system to provide schools/institutions with free access to paid courses/lessons via coupon codes, with admin tracking of student usage.

## Instructions

- This is Task ID: 260315-auto-791
- Must ACTUALLY IMPLEMENT code changes (not just document)
- Must write build.md summarizing what was implemented
- Previous review found 6 CRITICAL issues that need fixing:
  1. Unresolved git merge conflicts in 5 files
  2. Duplicate AccessCodes registration in payload.config.ts
  3. lessonId not passed to AccessGateProvider in lesson page
  4. No server-side block for accessCode type (SSR content leak)
  5. onSuccess callback is a no-op (modal never closes)
  6. Anonymous users bypass the gate entirely

## Discoveries

**Critical Issues Found in Review:**
- 5 source files contain unresolved `<<<<<<< HEAD` / `=======` / `>>>>>>> origin/dev` merge conflict markers
- `payload.config.ts` has `AccessCodes` registered TWICE (lines 148 and 176)
- Lesson page (`page.tsx`) never passes `lessonId` prop to AccessGateProvider - gate never activates
- Lesson page has no server-side block for `accessCode` type (only `mandatory` and `paid` are blocked)
- `onSuccess` callback in AccessGateProvider does nothing - modal stays open after redemption
- Anonymous users see no gate at all for accessCode type (showAccessCodeModal requires !!user)

**Spec Requirements (from spec.md):**
- FR-001: Add `accessCode` access type to system
- FR-002: Create `access-codes` collection
- FR-003: User redeemed codes field (replaced by FR-004 approach - acceptable)
- FR-004: Create `code-redemptions` collection
- FR-005: Create redemption API endpoint
- FR-006: Create AccessCodeGateModal component
- FR-007: Admin CSV export
- NFR-001: i18n translations (done)
- NFR-002: Security (rate limiting NOT implemented - missing)

## Accomplished

**Previously Implemented (but with bugs):**
- `src/infra/auth/access-types.ts` - Added `accessCode` to ACCESS_TYPES (has merge conflict)
- `src/server/payload/collections/Lessons.ts` - Added accessCode option (has merge conflict)
- `src/server/payload/collections/Courses.ts` - Added accessCode option (has merge conflict)
- `src/server/payload/collections/AccessCodes.ts` - Created (has massive merge conflicts)
- `src/server/payload/collections/CodeRedemptions.ts` - Created
- `src/app/api/access-codes/redeem/route.ts` - Created
- `src/app/api/access-codes/check/route.ts` - Created
- `src/app/api/access-codes/export/route.ts` - Created
- `src/ui/web/auth/AccessCodeGateModal.tsx` - Created
- `src/ui/web/auth/AccessGateProvider.tsx` - Modified (has merge conflict, onSuccess bug)
- `src/client/hooks/useAccessGate.ts` - Modified (missing setHasRedeemedCode export)
- `src/i18n/en.json` and `src/i18n/he.json` - Added translation strings
- `src/payload.config.ts` - Added collections (has duplicate registration bug)

**Still Needed (FIXING):**
1. Resolve all git merge conflicts in 5 files
2. Remove duplicate AccessCodes registration (line 176)
3. Add `lessonId={lesson.id}` to all AccessGateProvider instances in lesson page
4. Add server-side block for accessCode type in lesson page
5. Fix onSuccess callback - export setHasRedeemedCode from useAccessGate
6. Handle anonymous users for accessCode type

## Relevant Files / Directories

**Files with Merge Conflicts (NEED RESOLUTION):**
- `src/infra/auth/access-types.ts`
- `src/server/payload/collections/AccessCodes.ts`
- `src/server/payload/collections/Lessons.ts`
- `src/server/payload/collections/Courses.ts`
- `src/ui/web/auth/AccessGateProvider.tsx`

**Files to Fix:**
- `src/payload.config.ts` (remove duplicate AccessCodes at line 176)
- `src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/chapters/[chapterSlug]/lessons/[lessonSlug]/page.tsx` (add lessonId prop, add server-side block)
- `src/client/hooks/useAccessGate.ts` (export setHasRedeemedCode)
- `src/ui/web/auth/AccessGateProvider.tsx` (wire up onSuccess callback)

**Documentation:**
- `/home/runner/work/A-Guy/A-Guy/.tasks/260315-auto-791/spec.md` - Feature specification
- `/home/runner/work/A-Guy/A-Guy/.tasks/260315-auto-791/plan.md` - Implementation plan
- `/home/runner/work/A-Guy/A-Guy/.tasks/260315-auto-791/review.md` - Code review with issues
- `/home/runner/work/A-Guy/A-Guy/.tasks/260315-auto-791/build.md` - Build report (needs updating after fixes)
